title: Background Removal
description: Foreground / background separation using BiRefNet (MIT). Returns an RGBA cutout with a straight (non-premultiplied) alpha channel, so downstream nodes can re-composite over any background without dark fringes.
Two profiles are shipped: the default 1K BiRefNet and a higher-resolution 2K variant for fine hair / detailed edges. Runs on CPU, Apple Silicon (MPS), and CUDA.

input.description: AVI image stream to remove the background from.

output.description: RGBA PNG (straight alpha) as raw stream — pipe to any node accepting image input.

birefnet-hr.title: BiRefNet HR — 2K, finer hair / edge detail (MIT)

background_removal.model.title: Model
background_removal.model.description: HuggingFace model identifier for background removal (overrides the profile default)

background_removal.maxEdge.title: Max input edge (px)
background_removal.maxEdge.description: Downscale source so long edge <= this value before inference; alpha is upsampled back to the (capped) source size for compositing. Lower = faster + less VRAM; higher = sharper edges.

background_removal.profile.title: Model
background_removal.profile.description: BiRefNet variant — default is 1K, HR is 2K for finer edges.
